mcpBridgePanel.title: MCP Servers
mcpBridgePanel.description: Configure headers and OAuth for remote Streamable HTTP MCP servers.

settings.chatToolsDesc: When enabled, tools from active remote MCP servers are injected into the current chat context.

servers.title: Remote MCP Servers
servers.description: Connect, authorize, refresh tools, and edit each remote MCP server independently.
servers.empty: No MCP servers yet. Click Add server to configure one.

toolRunner.title: Tool Runner
toolRunner.needConnect: Connect at least one remote MCP server first.
toolRunner.auditHint: Each run is written to the local browser audit log.

dialog.description: Enter a remote Streamable HTTP MCP endpoint. For local development, expose your service over HTTP first.
dialog.name: Server name
dialog.jsonHint: Supports the standard mcpServers wrapper. `type` and `url` are required; only `type`, `url`, `headers`, and `oauth` are accepted.
dialog.headersHint: JSON object. These headers will be attached to every Streamable HTTP request.
dialog.warnStreamableHttp: Saving will use the URL, headers, and OAuth settings shown here when connecting to this MCP server.

oauth.enableHint: When enabled, the extension uses MCP remote auth discovery, DCR / preregistered clients, PKCE, and token refresh.

toast.serverDeleteConfirmDesc: After deletion, this server will no longer participate in chat tool calls.
